acceptance_targets: [chapter_01_award_001] Pass if the revised mission/aftermath lineation lets a reader identify one specific child or route detail from the extraction and visualize one concrete mishap or handling beat in the common-room exchange anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:273 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:279; fail if the resistance cost still reads as generic 'first-years got hurt' while the C-13 thread remains the only highly particularized plot line.

[chapter_01_craft_001] Pass if within the revised span anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:61 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:83 there are at least two distinct paragraphs containing Owen-only internal experience before Martha reaches the equivalent of 'Because from where I'm sitting...'; fail if the sequence can still be read as 10+ consecutive externally observed paragraphs.

[chapter_01_dialogue_001] Pass if the revised breakfast and common-room exchanges anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:83, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:113, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:287 still make Martha's grievance unmistakable but at least two of her longer speeches show speech-pressure friction and no single line reduces Owen to a perfectly balanced three-part thesis; fail if her accusations still read like cleanly finished set pieces.

[chapter_01_prose_001] Pass if, in the revised versions of the cited passages, at least three of those image beats are recast into syntactically different constructions and no more than two of the cited locations still depend on 'as if' for the main descriptive turn; fail if the revised chapter still repeats the same comparison hinge across most of those moments.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised mission/aftermath lineation lets a reader identify one specific child or route detail from the extraction and visualize one concrete mishap or handling beat in the common-room exchange anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:273 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:279; fail if the resistance cost still reads as generic 'first-years got hurt' while the C-13 thread remains the only highly particularized plot line.
findings.problem: The chapter gives the C-13 discovery line materially specific pressure, but the human counterweight stays comparatively generic: Martha's mission is framed as 'two first-years,' the injury arrives mostly as reported aftermath, and Owen's neglect lands as a thesis rather than as a singular missed event. That keeps the moral split legible without making it devastating enough for award-level doubleness.
findings.rewrite_direction: Sharpen the resistance strand in the setup and aftermath at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:21, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:83, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:273 by giving at least one of the moved children or the extraction route a specific memorable detail before or during the fallout scene; then revise Martha's report at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:279 so Owen can picture one concrete action he failed to help with, without softening the fact that C-13 still captures more of his attention.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if within the revised span anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:61 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:83 there are at least two distinct paragraphs containing Owen-only internal experience before Martha reaches the equivalent of 'Because from where I'm sitting...'; fail if the sequence can still be read as 10+ consecutive externally observed paragraphs.
findings.problem: From Penrose's forced confession through Martha's first accusation, the chapter runs more than ten consecutive paragraphs with almost no Owen-only interiority. In a close-third book, that external-only stretch turns a public cruelty scene and the argument immediately after it into observable blocking rather than lived pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Break the run at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:61, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:73, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:77, and/or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:83 with brief internal beats specific to Owen: bodily anti-flinch control, shame, tactical thought, or self-assessment that only he could have. Keep the outward action, but the scene needs to stay anchored inside his pressured avoidance rather than reading like a camera.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised breakfast and common-room exchanges anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:83, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:113, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:287 still make Martha's grievance unmistakable but at least two of her longer speeches show speech-pressure friction and no single line reduces Owen to a perfectly balanced three-part thesis; fail if her accusations still read like cleanly finished set pieces.
findings.problem: Martha's key confrontational lines are lucid in the right direction but too compositionally neat: they arrive as balanced mini-speeches and total diagnoses of Owen's flaw, with very little interruption, restart, or social mess. Under this much anger and fatigue, the scene starts to sound written rather than overheard.
findings.rewrite_direction: Roughen Martha's accusation beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:83, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:91, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:113, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:287. Keep her bluntness and practical register, but trade some of the clean parallel phrasing for pressure-shaped speech: interruption, repetition that is not perfectly symmetrical, a partial restart, or a concrete task/body detour that shows her anger landing in real time.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, in the revised versions of the cited passages, at least three of those image beats are recast into syntactically different constructions and no more than two of the cited locations still depend on 'as if' for the main descriptive turn; fail if the revised chapter still repeats the same comparison hinge across most of those moments.
findings.problem: The prose leans too often on the same 'as if' explanatory hinge for image-making. Because it recurs across description, characterization, and mood-setting, the chapter starts revealing its sentence machinery instead of letting each image arrive in its own shape.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework several of the repeated comparison beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:11, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:71, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:95, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:157, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:253 so they do not all enter through 'as if'; use a mix of direct physical description, metaphor, or free-indirect judgment, and preserve only the strongest one or two instances of the template.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
